class.name: UtilityAIDotProductVector3SearchCriterion
class.brief_description: Scores and filters based the angle the set dot_product_vector has compared to the search space node direction.
class.description: The [Vector3] dot product search criterion can be used to score and filter based the angle the set dot_product_vector has compared to the search space node direction ([code]-global_transform.basis.z[/code] rotated by rotation).

members.member: The global direction vector to compare the search space node direction vectors to.
If filtering is in use, the result given by the dot product is compared to this value for filtering.

If filtering is in use, this is the comparison that is done to decide on the filtering. The choices are: [code]LessThan:0,LessOrEqual:1,Equal:2,MoreOrEqual:3,MoreThan:4[/code]. For instance, if [i]LessThan[/i] is chosen then any node that gets a dot product value of less than the value of [member filtering_value] will be filtered out.
